entry.title: BERRICHI Light Natural Glow Cream REFILL 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 24.90

Discover Berrichi face cream Light – natural radiance and balance for your skin. Face cream Light is a light and silky cream designed to moisturise and protect combination and normal skin on a daily basis. It helps to restore the skin’s natural moisture balance, evens the texture and supports the skin’s natural defences, leaving skin radiant and soft.

Berrichi Light Natural Glow Cream:

  • Light and fast-absorbing texture that does not clog pores
  • Deep moisturising action that restores the skin’s moisture balance
  • Soothes irritations and soothes inflamed skin
  • Smoothes the skin tone, reducing wrinkles and pigmentation.
  • Anti-ageing

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran – antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Astaxanthin – an antioxidant, the most effective natural anti-ageing agent with the ability to penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. Stimulates the production of collagen, balances the skin’s moisture levels, protects the skin from central irritants.
  • Aloe Vera – antioxidant, antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that accelerate healing, moisturise the skin and prevent ageing.
  • Rough Razor Beard – with antibacterial properties, it helps soothe and protect the skin, promoting a smoother, brighter complexion.

For combined and normal skin. Recommended for age 25+

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over serum. Suitable as a foundation for make-up, it can also be used at night.

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado Oil)*, Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil)*, Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay Oil), Simmondsia Chinesis seed oil (Organic Jojoba oil)*, Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate (Olivem1000), Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin**, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice/Potassium Sorbate/Sodium Benzoate/Citric acid (Aloe Vera), Dehydroacetic Acid/Benzoic Acid/Benzyl Alcohol/Sorbic Acid (Sharomix705), Helianthus Annuus Seed oil/Polyglyceryl-3 Palmitate/Usnea Barbata extract (Usnea Barbata), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haemotococcus pluvialis/Tocopherol (Astaxanthin oil)

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Made using organic ingredients

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: BERRICHI Age Defence Night Cream REFILL 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Night Cream
Price: 25.90

Berrichi night cream Night works for your skin while you rest. Rich and deeply hydrating, this night cream helps the skin to recover and recover from the day’s challenges, leaving it looking fresh and rested in the morning. It nourishes, hydrates and slows the signs of ageing, leaving skin more supple and plump.

Berrichi  Age Defence Night Cream:

  • Nourishes and restores, making the skin stronger and more resistant
  • Soothes irritated and inflamed skin
  • Deep moisturizing effect that keeps the skin soft and supple
  • Evens skin tone, reducing fine lines and wrinkles
  • Stimulates blood circulation, helping the skin to regenerate faster

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran – antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Astaxanthin – an antioxidant, the most effective natural anti-ageing agent with the ability to penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. Stimulates the production of collagen, balances the skin’s moisture levels, protects the skin from central irritants.
  • Retinol – improves skin texture, increases radiance and acts against signs of aging. Retinol accelerates cell healing and skin renewal, increases collagen production, while smoothing out unevenness
  • Aloe Vera – antioxidant, antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that accelerate healing, moisturise the skin and prevent ageing.
  • Cacay oil – rich in vitamins A and E. Helps reduce wrinkles and improve skin elasticity, stimulating collagen production and cell renewal.

 Suitable for all skin types. Recommended for age 25+

How to use: Apply to clean skin or apply serum. Use only as a night cream because it contains retinol. The effect of retinol is deactivated by the sun and can make the skin more sensitive to the sun.

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado oil), Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil), Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay oil), Aleurites Moluccana seed oil (Kukui nut oil), Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis leaf juice (Aloe Vera), Benzyl Alcohol/Dehydroacetic Acid/Sorbic Acid/Benzoic Acid, Retinol/ Adenosine/Hydroxypropyl Cyclodextrin (Retinol A-vitamin), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haematococcus pluvialis/AstaZine (Astaxanthin oil)

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: BERRICHI Light Natural Glow Cream 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 30.90

Discover Berrichi face cream Light – natural radiance and balance for your skin. Face cream Light is a light and silky cream designed to moisturise and protect combination and normal skin on a daily basis. It helps to restore the skin’s natural moisture balance, evens the texture and supports the skin’s natural defences, leaving skin radiant and soft.

Berrichi Light Natural Glow Cream:

  • Light and fast-absorbing texture that does not clog pores
  • Deep moisturising action that restores the skin’s moisture balance
  • Soothes irritations and soothes inflamed skin
  • Smoothes the skin tone, reducing wrinkles and pigmentation.
  • Anti-ageing

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran – antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Astaxanthin – an antioxidant, the most effective natural anti-ageing agent with the ability to penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. Stimulates the production of collagen, balances the skin’s moisture levels, protects the skin from central irritants.
  • Aloe Vera – antioxidant, antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that accelerate healing, moisturise the skin and prevent ageing.
  • Rough Razor Beard – with antibacterial properties, it helps soothe and protect the skin, promoting a smoother, brighter complexion.

For combined and normal skin. Recommended for age 25+

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over serum. Suitable as a foundation for make-up, it can also be used at night.

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado Oil)*, Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil)*, Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay Oil), Simmondsia Chinesis seed oil (Organic Jojoba oil)*, Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate (Olivem1000), Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin**, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice/Potassium Sorbate/Sodium Benzoate/Citric acid (Aloe Vera), Dehydroacetic Acid/Benzoic Acid/Benzyl Alcohol/Sorbic Acid (Sharomix705), Helianthus Annuus Seed oil/Polyglyceryl-3 Palmitate/Usnea Barbata extract (Usnea Barbata), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haemotococcus pluvialis/Tocopherol (Astaxanthin oil)

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Made using organic ingredients

The glass bottle and pump system are reusable.

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: BERRICHI Age Defence Night Cream 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Night Cream
Price: 33.90

Berrichi night cream Night works for your skin while you rest. Rich and deeply hydrating, this night cream helps the skin to recover and recover from the day’s challenges, leaving it looking fresh and rested in the morning. It nourishes, hydrates and slows the signs of ageing, leaving skin more supple and plump.

Berrichi  Age Defence Night Cream:

  • Nourishes and restores, making the skin stronger and more resistant
  • Soothes irritated and inflamed skin
  • Deep moisturizing effect that keeps the skin soft and supple
  • Evens skin tone, reducing fine lines and wrinkles
  • Stimulates blood circulation, helping the skin to regenerate faster

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran – antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Astaxanthin – an antioxidant, the most effective natural anti-ageing agent with the ability to penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. Stimulates the production of collagen, balances the skin’s moisture levels, protects the skin from central irritants.
  • Retinol – improves skin texture, increases radiance and acts against signs of aging. Retinol accelerates cell healing and skin renewal, increases collagen production, while smoothing out unevenness
  • Aloe Vera – antioxidant, antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that accelerate healing, moisturise the skin and prevent ageing.
  • Cacay oil – rich in vitamins A and E. Helps reduce wrinkles and improve skin elasticity, stimulating collagen production and cell renewal.

 Suitable for all skin types. Recommended for age 25+

How to use: Apply to clean skin or apply serum. Use only as a night cream because it contains retinol. The effect of retinol is deactivated by the sun and can make the skin more sensitive to the sun.

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado oil), Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil), Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay oil), Aleurites Moluccana seed oil (Kukui nut oil), Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis leaf juice (Aloe Vera), Benzyl Alcohol/Dehydroacetic Acid/Sorbic Acid/Benzoic Acid, Retinol/ Adenosine/Hydroxypropyl Cyclodextrin (Retinol A-vitamin), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haematococcus pluvialis/AstaZine (Astaxanthin oil)

The glass bottle and pump system are reusable.

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: NURME Neroli Collagen Renewal Night Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Night Cream
Price: 27.50

This night cream deeply moisturizes and nourishes, restoring collagen and elasticity lost due to early signs of aging. High in vitamins C and E, along with passion fruit oil, it hydrates and revitalizes the skin, making it youthful and elastic.

Neroli oil, derived from bitter orange blossoms, offers powerful antimicrobial and antibacterial properties, making it ideal for acne-prone skin and clogged pores. It regulates sebum production, balancing oily skin. Rich in antioxidants and vitamin E, neroli oil provides anti-aging and anti-acne benefits, reducing inflammation and redness.

This product is packaged in a recyclable polypropylene airless bottle. The airless packaging prevents air exposure, ensuring microbiological purity and extending the shelf life of natural cosmetics.

How to use: Apply to clean skin after other serums or creams. Allow to absorb completely.

Ingredients: Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Flower Water*, Aqua*, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride**, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil*, Glycerin**, Passiflora Edulis Seed Oil*, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Betain**, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose Distearate**, Glyceryl Stearate**, Cetearyl Alcohol**, Myristyl Myristate**, Sodium Levulinate**, Ascorbyl Palmitate**, Sodium Anisate**, Panthenol*, Benzyl Alcohol**, Tocopherol**, Lactic Acid**, Sodium Hyaluronate**, Allantoin*, Sodium Benzoate**, Potassium Sorbate**, Xanthan Gum**, Hectorite**, Cellulose**, Passiflora Incarnata Extract*, Citrus Aurantium Flower Oil*, Limonene***, Linalool***. 

* Natural origin
** Natural cosmetics approved ingredient
***Occurs naturally in essential oils

entry.title: NAIF Nurturing Night Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Night Cream
Price: 23.90

Naïf Nurturing Night Cream contributes to a good night's sleep. The regenerating night cream soothes the skin and supports the natural skin process. Includes almond oil, shea butter and macadamia extract for ultimate hydration and moisture retention. No more dry spots!

The cream absorbs quickly, doesn't stick and doesn't make the skin feel tight. So you don't have to worry when resting your head on your pillow. The night cream is made without mineral oils, microplastics and silicones.

The Naïf regenerating night cream is for every skin type. So also for the most sensitive skin. All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: A night cream is best applied if you apply a good, thick amount. Do this on clean, cleansed skin. And don't forget to apply it to the neck and décolleté. 

Ingredients: Aqua/ Water, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Glycerin, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Methylpropanediol, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Sucrose Stearate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus, (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Xanthan Gum, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Parfum/Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: MÁDARA SOS+ Sensitive Night Cream 70ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Night Cream
Price: 42.90

This intense night cream soothes sensitive, easily irritated and redness-prone skin. With extract of algea, hyaluronic acid and jojoba oil, the non-greasy formula works to balance the skin's microbiome and reinforce its lipid barrier. Helps reduce skin reactivity, redness and burning.

How to use: Apply to clean face, neck and décolleté every evening. Use in combination with MÁDARA SOS+ Sensitive Moisturiser for the best results.

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-3 Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Coco- Caprylate, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Isoamyl Laurate, Aqua, Hydrolyzed Rhodophyceae Extract, Cellulose, Octyldodecanol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Xanthan Gum, Irvingia gabonensis kernel butter, Potassium Hydroxide, Hydrogenated Coco-glycerides, Sodium Hyaluronate, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Tocopherol, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Sodium phytate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: HEJ Organic Organic Sensitive 24h Face Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Day Cream
Price: 17.90

Simply a delicate all-rounder that provides intensive moisture and ensures radiant skin. Rich and quickly absorbed texture ensures that the skin feels pleasant, no matter what time of day.

  • Promotes the balance of your skin barrier and deeply hydrates
  • Quickly absorbed texture
  • Natural power active ingredient complex made from hemp oil, oat and chamomile extract
  • Skin type: Especially for sensitive skin
  • Allergen-reduced perfume oil, 100% vegan and natural

Hemp Oil contains important Omega-6 fatty acids, promotes cell regeneration and protects the skin without feeling greasy.

Oat Extract has an anti-inflammatory and calming effect and is particularly suitable for sensitive skin.

Chamomile Flower Water has soothing and antibacterial characteristics and provides intensive hydration to the skin.

How to use: Apply to your face morning and evening after cleansing

Ingredients: Aqua, Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil, Glycerin, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate/Stearate, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Cetearyl Alcohol, Distarch Phosphate, Cannabis Sativa Seed Oil*, Hydrogenated Rapeseed Oil, Candelilla Cera, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract*, Hypericum Perforatum Extract*, Avena Sativa Kernel Extract*, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Alcohol, Tocopherol, Citric Acid, Parfum** *ingredients from certified organic agriculture, **natural essential oils

Organic | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources

entry.title: Vielö Organic Night Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Night Cream
Price: 59.00

Rich organic night cream to intensely hydrate and nourish the skin overnight and stimulate skin regeneration.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), rosehip seed oil (soothing), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), wheat germ oil (protecting) and organic extracts of chamomile (antiseptic), arnica (anti-inflammatory) and mallow (protecting).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to Use: Massage gently into freshly cleansed skin and neck. Use it in the evening and whenever your skin needs rich hydration.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil**, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Glycerin**, Cera Alba**, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate*, Aqua*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Sorbitan Sesquioleate*, Oenothera Biennis Oil**, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Polyglyceryl-3 Ricinoleate, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Sodium Anisate, Tocopherol*, Citric Acid*, Potassium Sorbate, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Viola Tricolor Extract**, Matricaria Chamomilla Flower Extract**, Arnica Montana Flower Extract**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Geraniol**/***, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Limonene**/***, Citral**/***.

* from natural origin (99,3%)
** certified organic (89,2%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.
